===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Production talent |b1=DSTRXN|b1flag=in|b1name=Nitish Singh Basera |b2=TR1GN0|b2flag=in|b2name=Harsh Saxena }} {{box|break}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentator |lang= Hindi |b1=Spero |b1flag=in|b1name= |b2=Divine |b2flag=in|b2name= |b3=IGPL Trooper |b3flag=in|b3name= }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Ruthless Invitational Showdown''' 11th February 2022 to 5th March 2022''. * '''''Prelims''' 11th February 2022 to 14th February 2022'' ** '' A total of 27 invited teams will play in the Prelims'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 3 groups''. ** '' Teams will compete in a round robin format ** '' 24 Matches to be played over a period of 4 days (Each team to play 16 Matches). ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 10 teams from the overall standings}} advance to Playoffs.'' * '''''Playoffs''' 22nd February 2022 to 27th February 2022'' ** '' A total of 27 teams (10 Qualified from Prelims + 17 Invited) will play in the Semi Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 3 groups''. ** '' Teams will compete in a round robin format ** '' 30 Matches to be played over a period of 6 days (Each team to play 20 Matches). ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 16 teams from the overall standings}} advance to Finals .'' * '''''Finals Face off:''' 1st March 2022 to 5th March 2022'' ** '' A total of 16 Qualified teams will play in the Grand Finals'' ** ''25 Matches to be played over a period of 5 days . ====Points Distribution==== {{{title|For {{abbr|"Points Matrix"|Points Matrix}} '''Click here'''.}}}
